name: twinning
description: Interface twin bootstrap: parse DDL, prepare deterministic twin artifacts, and stage bounded-memory tournament twins plus heavier replay backends

usage: twinning rest --spec <FILE> [--host HOST] [--port PORT] [--run COMMAND | --serve] [--report FILE] [--canary FILE] [--routing POLICY] [--base-prefix PREFIX] [--auth-mode MODE] [--strict] [--json]
twinning proof twin-pair --left LEFT.twin --right RIGHT.twin --queries cases.json --json

arguments.name: engine
arguments.description: Database engine to impersonate. V0 is Postgres-only; mysql and oracle remain declared-but-refused placeholders.

options.name: schema
options.description: SQL DDL file defining tables, constraints, and indexes

options.name: verify
options.description: Compiled verify constraint artifact (`verify.constraint.v1`) for twin-side validation

options.name: declaration
options.description: Optional catalog-declared subset identity (`twinning.catalog-declaration.v0`)

options.name: host
options.description: Listen host (default 127.0.0.1)

options.name: port
options.description: Listen port (default 5432 in the current Postgres-only build)

options.name: run
options.description: Run one child command against the live pgwire shell, then freeze final artifacts

options.name: serve
options.description: Run a standalone interactive pgwire shell until SIGINT/SIGTERM, then freeze final artifacts

options.name: report
options.description: Write the readiness report as JSON

options.name: snapshot
options.description: Write a deterministic bootstrap snapshot

options.name: query_trace
options.description: Write a redacted live query trace artifact for --run or --serve

options.name: spec
options.description: OpenAPI 3.x YAML or JSON spec file. Supports local refs; remote $ref URLs fetched at startup.

options.name: host
options.description: REST listen host

options.name: port
options.description: REST listen port

options.name: run
options.description: Run one child command against the live REST server, then exit

options.name: serve
options.description: Run interactive REST server until SIGINT/SIGTERM

options.name: report
options.description: Write REST session report as JSON (twinning.rest-report.v0)

options.name: canary
options.description: Assert REST session report against canary expectations

options.name: routing
options.description: Routing policy override: flat-crud | schema-first | prefix-scoped | auto (default)

options.name: base_prefix
options.description: Explicit path prefix to strip before resource classification (e.g. /api, /__admin)

options.name: auth_mode
options.description: REST auth shape mode override: shape (default) | bypass

options.name: strict
options.description: Fail startup if any route cannot be classified

options.name: restore
options.description: Restore a prior bootstrap snapshot

options.name: materialize_source_url
options.description: Capture declared Postgres source rows into the final report/snapshot using psql COPY

options.name: json
options.description: Emit JSON status messages

options.name: describe
options.description: Print the compiled operator manifest and exit 0

commands.name: health
commands.description: Emit read-only doctor health checks in the twinning.v0 envelope

commands.name: capabilities
commands.description: Emit machine-readable command and safety capabilities

commands.name: robot-triage
commands.description: Emit structured follow-up findings without reading or writing artifacts

fix_mode.reason: No doctor --fix mode is exposed until detector, backup, inverse, fixture, and undo coverage exists.

engine_support.postgres: bootstrap-ready plus run_once and interactive pgwire shells for the proven subset

implemented_surface: DDL catalog parsing
compiled verify artifact hashing
catalog declaration identity import
bootstrap report generation
snapshot write/restore with hash verification
committed-state snapshot freeze/restore
schema-declared live source materialization through psql COPY
run_once pgwire listener for the declared Postgres subset
interactive pgwire listener for the declared Postgres subset
prototype twin-pair proof report model, fixture harness, target evidence identities, and snapshot-pair CLI
restore-backed twin-pair orchestration runner, manifest parser, and schema
replay/proof backend policy for snapshot-backed, disk-backed, and delegated storage boundaries
storage-boundary reporting for tournament vs replay modes
REST twin: OpenAPI 3.x YAML/JSON to live HTTP server with Postgres-backed storage
v1 adaptive routing policy engine: flat-crud, schema-first, prefix-scoped evidence sources combined into ResourceTopology at startup
ResourceTopology with confidence scoring (Pinned/High/Medium/Low) and per-route conflict reporting
x-twinning OpenAPI extension for per-spec routing policy, base prefix, and auth mode overrides
Startup routing report: route coverage, confidence coverage, per-route classification table
Remote $ref URL resolution with 5s timeout and in-process cache
Response wrapper detection for data/items/results/entries payload fields and hint-matched semantic names
Auth shape compliance: enforce credential presence per declared security schemes, 401/403 with WWW-Authenticate (upcoming bd-bni1)
MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 wire twin: live server introspection or static manifest, tools/resources/prompts catalog, auth enforcement, stdio and HTTP transports
Snowflake HTTP wire protocol twin: Arrow IPC rowsetBase64 encoding, SHOW/DESCRIBE meta-queries, DDL catalog introspection, session lifecycle
read-only doctor health/capabilities/robot-docs/robot-triage
deferred_surface: snapshot-backed, disk-backed, and delegated replay/proof backend implementations behind policy gates
schema-load materialization inside production twin-pair orchestration
Auth credential validation (any non-empty credential in declared format is accepted in shape mode)

artifacts.name: twinning.v0
artifacts.description: Bootstrap readiness report for the twin configuration

artifacts.name: twinning.snapshot.v0
artifacts.description: Content-addressed snapshot of parsed catalog identity and optional committed relation state

artifacts.name: twinning.twin-pair-proof.v0
artifacts.description: Interface-equivalence receipt for comparing two Postgres twins over one declared subset, with optional raw target evidence identities

artifacts.name: twinning.twin-pair-replay-result.v0
artifacts.description: Per-case timing-independent replay diff inputs: snapshot provenance, result hashes, and SQLSTATE parity

artifacts.name: twinning.twin-pair-orchestration-manifest.v0
artifacts.description: Manifest-first production twin-pair proof orchestration contract

artifacts.name: twinning.rest-report.v0
artifacts.description: REST session report: spec identity, routing table with confidence scores, exercised endpoints, refusals, constraint violations, and optional canary assertions

artifacts.name: twinning.mcp-report.v0
artifacts.description: MCP session report: server identity, catalog hash, tool/resource/prompt counts, session request counts, and tool call outcomes

artifacts.name: twinning.snowflake-report.v0
artifacts.description: Snowflake wire session report: catalog identity, session lifecycle, query dispatch counts, and canary validation results
